output: Executed batch 11 task `T15` as a final validation pass. TypeScript compiles, the indicator-related `document.createElement` usage is fully gone, `useTimelineEditing` remains deleted, and `drop-target-new-track` is only toggled by `DropIndicator`. During validation I also removed two unrelated `document.createElement` calls and extracted `useTimelineState` types so the provider hook stays under 300 LOC. The plan is not fully green yet: `useTimelineData.ts` still exceeds the 300-line target, and interactive/manual timeline testing could not be completed because the sandbox denied starting the Vite dev server (`listen EPERM`). A checkpoint was written to `.megaplan/plans/video-editor-timeline-well-20260325-1848/execution_batch_11.json`.
deviations: T15 required cleanup edits outside the original phase-3 hook split to satisfy criterion 2 and reduce hook-size noise: `useClientRender.ts` no longer auto-creates a download anchor because the shell already exposes a download link via `renderResultUrl`, `mediaMetadata.ts` now uses `new Audio()` for metadata loading, and `useTimelineState` context types were extracted to `useTimelineState.types.ts` so the hook itself is 244 LOC.
T15 could not complete manual interaction testing because the sandbox denied binding the Vite dev server port (`Error: listen EPERM: operation not permitted 127.0.0.1:4173`).
T15 did not make the entire plan pass criterion 10: `src/tools/video-editor/hooks/useTimelineData.ts` still measures 678 LOC.

Advisory observation mismatch: git status/content hash delta found unclaimed files: src/tools/video-editor/components/PreviewPanel/OverlayEditor.tsx, src/tools/video-editor/compositions/VisualClip.tsx
Skipped malformed task_updates[0]: invalid field types or enum values.
1/1 batch tasks have no executor update — tracking is incomplete.

task_updates.executor_notes: Validation results: `npx tsc --noEmit` passes; `rg -n "document.createElement" src/tools/video-editor` returns no hits; `rg -n "actionDragStateRef" src/tools/video-editor` only hits `useClipDrag.ts`; `rg -n "useTimelineEditing" src/tools/video-editor` returns no hits; and `rg -n "classList.*drop-target-new-track" src/tools/video-editor` only hits `DropIndicator.tsx`. `useTimelineState.ts` is now 244 LOC and `useClientRender.ts` is 299 LOC after cleanup, but `useTimelineData.ts` remains 678 LOC, so criterion 10 is still unmet. The dev server smoke start failed with `listen EPERM`, so criteria requiring manual interaction validation remain unverified in this sandbox.

sense_check_acknowledgments.executor_note: Not all 10 success criteria can be marked passed from this environment. Criteria 1-5 and 7 pass by code and grep validation: there is a single `DropIndicator` system, `document.createElement` is gone from `src/tools/video-editor`, `actionDragStateRef` is internal to `useClipDrag.ts`, `useTimelineEditing` has zero references, and `drop-target-new-track` is only toggled in `DropIndicator.tsx`. Criterion 10 remains unmet because `useTimelineData.ts` is 678 LOC. Criteria 6, 8, and 9 were not manually verified because `npm run dev -- --host 127.0.0.1 --port 4173` failed with `listen EPERM`, so no interactive browser validation could be completed in this sandbox.
